title: ramium calophlebum
intro: Ramium calophlebum is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. Ramium calophlebum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
